channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Numerous potholes in Rectory lane, 10th April
item.description:
These were repaired but unfortunately have re-appeared and case driving around to avoid . There ias a lot in one area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bradenham close SE17 2LU, 10th April
item.description:
This builders rubbish has been left here in a Southwark street outside a Southwark resource centre for more than two years. It looks scruffy and I think it is a hazzard. Also next to this there is a badly broken paving slab by the tree. This is also dangerous. I have reported this three times before.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bradenham Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours here treat this area like a bin, 10th April
item.description:
This area near the garages numbers 1-7 phelp st SE17 has just been cleared and already neighbours here have started dumping rubbish already just behind the wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 7 Chetwynd Road NW5 1BX, 10th April
item.description:
Hi Camden tree department I live at 7 Chetwynd Road and I’d like to report a dead tree outside our house. One of the branches of the tree fell off last week narrowly missing our car, and I’m worried that with the next strong wind the whole tree could fall. Would you be able to remove the tree and plant another in its place?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chetwynd Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light has exposed live wiring, 10th April
item.description:
The street light at the rear of 103 Kale road has its lower cover missing and there are live wires and connections hanging out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redpoll Way, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 10th April
item.description:
Street light (one on from the bus stop) not working at 21:45 on 10/04/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Creswell Drive, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti at 261 Brixton road london SW9 6LH sprayed on a black wooden fence., 10th April
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on a black wooden fence at 261 Brixton road SW9 6LH. The location is to the left hand side of the Jamm bar. Please can the graffiti be removed. The graffiti has been up for a little over two weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 262, Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste by bins, 10th April
item.description:
Please can this dumped large waste be removed swiftly?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-44, Claude Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox near the road, 10th April
item.description:
Please remove it, it’s very close to the road on the right side in the middle of m25 southbound between the opposing lanes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M25, Theydon Garnon, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 58 priory road, 10th April
item.description:
Sorry I ticked fly tipping it wasn’t working bascally 58 flat a didn’t rip up the box from recycling as it had flat a 58 on the box left out side for recycle me but as not ripped up it be left on the road Also outside 58 priory road this week was dumped a child mattresse and furniture I belive this was flat c 58 priory road as she is only one with children apart from me But it could of been someone elese that dumped outside our address
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 134, Abbey Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ELime bikes Park dangerously on the pavement., 10th April
item.description:
ELime bikes Park dangerously on the pavement might hurt somebody. Whitcomb street next to TWG Tea.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fake grass fly tipped, 10th April
item.description:
Fake grass fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vernham Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Door, 10th April
item.description:
Entrance door is not secure and anyone can enter through it at Langley Court 40-67

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bradenham Close, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked SORN in lane for multiple use of house on Moordown / Ankerdine, 10th April
item.description:
Car is parked, a long with lots of flytipping, its been there for months (car's been there for at least 3 years SORN but in public access road). The occupant no longer lives there. We are clearing our garage and garden and need access to remove rubble. The car doesnt allow any other cars down the road. Please advise on removal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Moordown, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrical Meter cupboard Langary Court, 10th April
item.description:
The building 1-39 langary court have an issue on floor 8 and 7 eletrical cupboard door is unsecured. Can you please fixed it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 10th April
item.description:
Avery Hill Park near Avery Hill Road entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of broken glass all down the road, 10th April
item.description:
Lots of smashed glass all along the pavement and road up the whole road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 10th April
item.description:
Was originally outside the gate of a residential property. Then got moved to the carpark.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilbert Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tippibg, 10th April
item.description:
A range of mainly textiles dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal alleyway ankerdine crescdnt /donaldson road, 10th April
item.description:
After the bank holiday, I noticed bin bags left in alleyway outside my garden gate. It is not my rubbish. I noticed it 10th april. Some rubbish spilling out onto alleyway due to foxes. This is clearly bcos bins were full over Easter. This is not usual in our alleyway. Do we need a deterrent?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
